body_transformation: The plump rounded body silhouette remains intact, now covered in deep sapphire-blue scales with subtle violet twilight undertones. The leaf bulb on the back transforms into a reinforced dorsal spine structure with obsidian-black armor plating, its tip glowing with golden amber energy. The curled spiral tail tip gains a metallic sheen and subtle crimson flame-like veining along its length. The pale cream underbelly adopts a smooth, leathery texture with faint golden amber streaks, while the red eyes with white highlights retain their shape but now feature slit-pupil metallic sheens.
signature_feature: Dorsal spines: obsidian armor plating with golden amber energy glow and jagged crimson vein patterns.
